items.summary_en: Antwerp received a $2.3 million state grant for a workforce housing project. The money will help support new housing development in the local area.
items.summary_ko: 미국 오하이오주 앤트워프가 근로자 주택 개발 사업을 위해 주정부 지원금 230만 달러를 받았다. 이 자금은 지역 내 새 주택 개발을 돕는 데 쓰일 예정이다.
items.title_en: Antwerp Gets $2.3 Million for Worker Housing

items.raw_excerpt: BHPian suzuki san recently shared this with other enthusiasts:I drove up from Goa to Bombay a couple of weeks ago.I used the NH66 till Oni and then proceeded via Anuskura Ghat to Karad, Satara, Poona and ...
items.summary_en: A driver shares first-hand updates on road conditions from Goa to Mumbai via Anuskura Ghat. The report covers the NH66 highway and alternate routes through Karad, Satara, and Pune.
items.summary_ko: 한 운전자가 고아에서 뭄바이까지 아니스쿠라 가트를 경유하는 도로 상태를 직접 전했다. NH66 고속도로와 카라드, 사타라, 푸네를 거치는 대체 경로 상황이 포함되어 있다.
items.title_en: Goa to Mumbai road conditions and traffic via Anuskura

items.raw_excerpt: In fünf Minuten sind alle wichtigen Orte des täglichen Bedarfs erreichbar. Das ist die Idee des Fünf-Minuten-Dorfs. Diese und weitere 49 Wohnlösungen präsentiert eine Ziviltechnikerkammer-Ausstellung. Für mehr Umsetzungen brauche es aber Anpassungen in den Fördersystemen, so die Experten.
items.summary_en: An exhibition in Salzburg presents the idea of a five-minute village. It shows 50 housing solutions where daily needs can be reached within five minutes. Experts say funding rules need changes so small local projects can be easier to build.
items.summary_ko: 잘츠부르크의 한 전시가 ‘5분 마을’ 구상을 소개한다. 생활에 필요한 주요 장소를 5분 안에 갈 수 있는 주거 해법 50가지를 보여 준다. 전문가들은 이런 작은 지역 프로젝트가 더 쉽게 실현되려면 지원 제도 개선이 필요하다고 말한다.
items.title_en: Exhibition Shows a Five-Minute Village Idea
items.title_ko: 잘 사는 동네를 보여 주는 ‘5분 마을’ 전시
items.title_original: Ausstellung zeigt Fünf-Minuten-Dorf statt Pflegeheim: "Man könnte es Einzelinitiativen leichter machen" - Salzburger Nachrichten

items.raw_excerpt: Christopher und Katharina Rainer haben der alten Brennerei in Straßwalchen neues Leben eingehaucht. Birne und Apfel bauen sie selber und und verwandeln sie zum Edelbrand.
items.summary_en: Christopher and Katharina Rainer have brought an old distillery in Strasswalchen back to life. They grow pears and apples themselves and turn the fruit into fine brandy.
items.summary_ko: 크리스토퍼와 카타리나 라이너가 슈트라스발헨의 오래된 증류소에 새 활기를 불어넣었다. 두 사람은 직접 키운 배와 사과로 고급 과일 브랜디를 만든다.
items.title_en: Old Distillery Finds New Life in Strasswalchen
items.title_ko: 슈트라스발헨의 오래된 증류소, 다시 살아나다
items.title_original: Obst zum Brand: Veitlbauer Voglhub in Straßwalchen - RTS Regional TV Salzburg

items.raw_excerpt: This quaint, waterfront village in Ontario is just the place to hit the brakes and relax. Here’s what to know about Lakefield.
items.summary_en: Lakefield is a small waterfront village in Ontario. It has a historic downtown and scenic winding roads nearby. The village is presented as a calm place to slow down and relax.
items.summary_ko: 레이크필드는 온타리오에 있는 작은 호숫가 마을입니다. 오래된 도심과 주변의 구불구불한 경치 좋은 길이 특징입니다. 잠시 속도를 늦추고 쉬어 가기 좋은 조용한 장소로 소개됐습니다.
items.title_en: Small Ontario Village Offers a Quiet Waterfront Stop

items.raw_excerpt: A beachcomber found a WWII German gas mask on Lombardsijde beach near Ostend, Belgium. Authorities confirmed its historical value with no safety risks.
items.summary_en: A beachcomber found a German gas mask from World War II on Lombardsijde beach near Ostend. Authorities said it had historical value and did not pose a safety risk.
items.summary_ko: 오스텐더 인근 롬바르드사이더 해변에서 해변을 걷던 사람이 2차대전 당시 독일군 방독면을 발견했습니다. 당국은 역사적 가치는 있지만 안전상 위험은 없다고 확인했습니다.
items.title_en: Beachcomber Finds WWII Gas Mask on Belgian Beach
items.title_ko: 벨기에 해변에서 발견된 2차대전 독일군 방독면

items.raw_excerpt: Linda Cameron describes how she rendered first aid to the former Crows player and held his hand as they waited for an ambulance following a truck crash in South Australia's Fleurieu Peninsula.
items.summary_en: Linda Cameron found former Crows player Tony Modra after a truck crash in South Australia's Fleurieu Peninsula. She gave him first aid and held his hand while they waited for an ambulance.
items.summary_ko: 린다 카메론은 사우스오스트레일리아 플뢰리외 반도에서 트럭 사고를 당한 전 크로우스 선수 토니 모드라를 발견했다. 그녀는 구급차를 기다리는 동안 응급처치를 하고 그의 손을 잡아주었다.
items.title_en: Woman helps former AFL star after truck crash in South Australia
items.title_ko: 사우스오스트레일리아 트럭 사고, 여성이 전직 AFL 스타 도와
items.title_original: 'I'm going to stay with you': Woman comes to Modra's aid moments after truck crash

items.raw_excerpt: A Police Sub-Inspector (PSI) attached to the Yadrami Police Station and a head constable were caught by the Lokayukta police while allegedly accepting a bribe in connection with the illegal trade of rice meant for the State government’s Anna Bhagya scheme on Thursday.
items.summary_en: Two police officers in Karnataka were caught accepting a bribe. The bribe was linked to illegal trade of rice meant for the Anna Bhagya welfare scheme. A Police Sub-Inspector and a head constable from Yadrami station were arrested.
items.summary_ko: 카르나타카주 경찰관 2명이 뇌물을 받은 혐의로 적발됐다. 이 뇌물은 주정부의 저소득층 쌀 지원사업인 안나 바기야(Anna Bhagya)용 쌀 불법 유통과 관련된 것으로 조사됐다. 야드라미 경찰서 소속 부경장과 경사가 체포됐다.
items.title_en: Karnataka police officers caught taking bribe over rice scheme
items.title_ko: 카르나타카주 쌀 지원사업 관련 경찰관 뇌물수수 현장 적발
items.title_original: PSI, head constable caught by Lokayukta while accepting bribe

items.summary_en: A small town in North Isere is gaining attention because of its location. It sits near Lyon, Grenoble, and Chambery, which helps it attract people interested in real estate.

items.summary_en: Sitatte Sapporo is opening in the new Sapporo Fukoku Seimei Koshiyama Building. The site is near the crossing of Sapporo Station Street and North 3jo Street. It will include first Hokkaido locations and special limited menus.
items.summary_ko: 시타테 삿포로가 새로 들어서는 삿포로 후코쿠생명 고시야마 빌딩에 문을 엽니다. 위치는 삿포로역 앞 거리와 북3조 거리가 만나는 곳 근처입니다. 홋카이도 첫 입점 매장과 한정 메뉴도 함께 선보입니다.

items.raw_excerpt: A firework mortar and a suspected pipe bomb have been found in a building being converted into an asylum seekers’ centre in Nuenen, Brabant. Workers discovered the devices on Thursday morning while moving furniture into the building on Pastoorsmast, police told regional broadcaster Omroep Brabant. A bomb disposal unit was called to the scene, and several of the building’s windows had also been smashed. The empty premises are being turned into a temporary shelter for up to 159 asylum seekers,...
items.summary_en: Workers found a firework mortar and a suspected pipe bomb while moving furniture into a building being turned into an asylum centre in Nuenen. A bomb disposal unit was called and several windows had been smashed. The building was being prepared to house up to 159 asylum seekers.
items.summary_ko: 뉘넌에서 난민센터로 개조 중인 건물에서 작업자들이 가구를 옮기다 폭죽 발사통과 의심되는 파이프 폭탄을 발견했다. 폭발물 처리반이 출동했으며 건물 유리창 여러 개가 깨져 있었다. 이 건물은 최대 159명의 난민을 수용할 임시 숙소로 준비 중이었다.
items.title_en: Explosives found at planned asylum centre in Nuenen
items.title_ko: 뉘넌 예정 난민센터에서 폭발물 발견
items.title_original: Explosives found at planned asylum centre in Nuenen

items.raw_excerpt: Rimouski is Canada's scenic city in Quebec and a top spot to retire with small-town charm, outdoor fun, and waterfront trails with river views.
items.summary_en: Rimouski is a scenic city in Quebec, Canada. The article says it is a good place to retire, with small-town charm, outdoor activities, and riverfront trails.

items.raw_excerpt: From Huy to Chimay via Arlon and Furnes, here are 10 small Belgian towns that are far too underrated and well worth a visit.
items.summary_en: A Brussels travel site shares ten small Belgian towns that many visitors miss. The list includes places such as Huy, Chimay, Arlon, and Furnes, and says they are worth a visit.
items.summary_ko: 브뤼셀의 여행 매체가 많은 여행자가 놓치기 쉬운 벨기에의 작은 마을 10곳을 소개했다. 목록에는 위, 시메, 아를롱, 퓌른 같은 곳이 포함됐고, 방문할 만한 가치가 있다고 전했다.

items.summary_en: A gourmet fair using local Kanazawa ingredients will start on November 19 at Hyatt Centric Kanazawa. The limited dinner features many kinds of local foods.

items.raw_excerpt: The Chinese film, which was filmed almost entirely in the Teochew dialect, has become a box office success in China, grossing over 1.7 billion yuan (S$322 million).
items.summary_en: The hit Chinese film Dear You will open in Singapore with Mandarin-dubbed screenings. The film was made mostly in the Teochew dialect and has earned over 1.7 billion yuan in China.

items.summary_en: Merida in Yucatan was recognized in the Conde Nast Traveler 2020 Readers' Choice Awards. The city was named one of the best small cities in the world.

items.raw_excerpt: Wesleyville Village is described as a "near-abandoned" heritage village, once a thriving 19th-century community. Now, thanks to volunteers …
items.summary_en: Wesleyville Village in Ontario was once a busy 19th-century community. The heritage village became nearly abandoned, but volunteers are now helping restore it and share its history.

items.raw_excerpt: Que tal viver uma experiência diferente perto do mar? Listamos cinco motivos para mostrar que praia no inverno pode ser tão boa quanto no verão. Spoiler: você tem a chance de relaxar com vistas paradisíacas só para você. Leia mais no Viver Bem!
items.summary_en: Casa Pino lists five reasons to visit the beach in Bombinhas, Santa Catarina, during winter. It says visitors can relax near the sea with quieter views than in summer.

items.raw_excerpt: The controversy over a town billboard urging Alberta leave Canada is growing. After the Town of Taber ordered the removal of a pro-separatism sign, there are now three billboards up in the town.
items.summary_en: A billboard campaign in Taber, Alberta, is growing after the town ordered one pro-separation sign removed. There are now three billboards in the town urging Alberta to leave Canada.
items.summary_ko: 앨버타주 테이버에서 분리 주장을 담은 광고판 논란이 커지고 있습니다. 시 당국이 광고판 하나를 철거하라고 명령한 뒤, 이제 마을에는 앨버타의 캐나다 탈퇴를 촉구하는 광고판 세 개가 걸렸습니다.
items.title_en: Alberta Town Billboard Dispute Grows

items.raw_excerpt: When a 16th birthday party invite went viral on Facebook in 2012, thousands descended on the town of Haren in the Netherlands
